description_long: This is a stylish white felt fedora hat featuring a wide, flat brim and a medium-height crown with a distinctive pinched front. The hat is accented with intentional brown burn marks and weathered spots, giving it a distressed, vintage appearance. Around the base of the crown, there is a decorative fabric band in a muted grayish tone, adorned with a loosely tied bow and a subtle floral pattern. The brim is slightly uneven, with some areas showing more pronounced discoloration and wear, enhancing its rugged, urban character. The overall construction suggests a soft, flexible felt material, likely wool or a wool blend, with a structured yet comfortable fit. This hat would be a fashionable accessory in urban environments, suitable for both casual and semi-formal streetwear.
description: A distressed white felt fedora with a wide, flat brim, brown burn marks, and a decorative gray fabric band with a bow. The hat has a pinched crown and a vintage, weathered look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat brim, the decorative band with a bow, and subtle burn marks on the crown.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the pinched crown, prominent brown burn mark, and the bow detail on the band.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous fabric band, less visible bow, and more even distribution of burn marks around the brim.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the pinched crown, large burn mark, and the trailing end of the decorative band.
